user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Quantum Analytics.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 08:55 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-02-17 16:18 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-26 09:28 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Quantum Analytics
Date: 2024-01-07
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is deployment blockers.

[00:08:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:12:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for vendor dependencies is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for vendor dependencies is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:24:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:26:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.
